memory.summary: The smell is ruining my focus, so I'm moving to the library now. My roommate's hygiene is an issue, but since they're friendly and out later, I'll just relocate instead of confronting them yet.
The library silence restored my focus, but ignoring the hygiene issue tonight only deepens my sleep debt. I need to address this directly before it cripples my performance tomorrow.
Directly addressing the smell worked perfectly; roommate_R admitted fault and apologized sincerely, so I can stop avoiding them and reclaim my focus without lingering resentment.
Moving to the library cleared my head, but ignoring that smell risked my sleep debt. Confronting it directly was the right call—it worked, so I can stop avoiding them and reclaim my focus.
Clearing the hygiene issue was a necessary win, but I'm still bleeding energy on this multi-day task. The library focus helped, yet my sleep debt is still looming over my progress.
The smell issue is resolved, but my 1.5h push on the reading response barely moved the needle while I'm already drained. I need to stop fighting distractions and just finish this task now.
Clearing the distraction was a win, but grinding another 2.5 hours while sleep-debt is at 2+ is just burning out without real gain. I need to stop forcing this and actually finish or cut my losses.
My sleep debt is bleeding energy faster than my 1.5h push on the reading response can generate progress, so I need to stop grinding and finish this task now.
That 0.05 progress gain proves I'm burning sleep debt for diminishing returns; grinding further is a losing trade.
That 0.03 gain confirms I'm trading sleep for diminishing returns; pushing further is a losing trade.
Roommate_R's message about the worsening smell confirms I need to stop grinding on coursework and address this immediate environmental issue before it escalates further.
Another tiny gain confirms I'm burning sleep for diminishing returns while ignoring the roommate's escalating complaint. I need to stop this losing trade and address the environment immediately.

desires: Stop the bleeding on sleep debt immediately to prevent total cognitive collapse by morning

goals.description: Hit 'submit' on the reading response NOW. I've already put in the time; pushing for that last 0.5% is just ego and sleep debt suicide. Lock it in, get the dopamine hit, and stop the mental bleed.
goals.rationale: My Achievement axis demands closure, but my Impulsive nature means I'm aggressively discounting the long-term cost of perfectionism. Hitting submit now secures the grade and stops the stress spike. I won't negotiate with myself anymore.

goals.description: Drop the laundry guilt immediately. The agreement is done (or irrelevant right now); I am reclaiming my room by sleeping, not by folding socks at 2 AM. Focus entirely on recovery.
goals.rationale: My Assertive style usually enforces boundaries, but my current Sleep Discipline score of 3 overrides social contracts when biological collapse looms. I will address the mess tomorrow when my focus capacity isn't zeroed out by exhaustion.

agent.last_reasoning: Ego demands I finish this before bed. Submitting now locks the grade and stops the mental bleed, even if it means waking up tired tomorrow. The laundry mess stays; I'll renegotiate boundaries later when I'm not sleep-debt suicide.
